name: voiceflow-vscode
description: Wispr Flow-style local voice dictation: press a key and speak, transcribe locally with whisper, clean up, and insert into the editor or terminal. Audio never leaves your machine.

voiceflow.recorder.description: Recording backend. auto = in-process native recorder (PvRecorder), falling back to the helper process automatically if the native module cannot load; addon = force the native recorder (no fallback); helper = force the helper exe.

voiceflow.language.description: Dictation language. auto = auto-detect (recommended; handles English, Chinese, and mixed correctly); zh = force Chinese; en = force English. Note: zh will translate pure-English speech into Chinese.

voiceflow.model.description: whisper model tier. small is the balanced default (CPU build).

voiceflow.model.sourceUrl.description: Custom model source for restricted networks. An https base URL (e.g. https://intranet/whisper-models) is used before HuggingFace — the model file name is appended. A local/UNC folder (e.g. \\server\share\models or D:\models) is copied from directly. Leave empty to use HuggingFace + hf-mirror.

voiceflow.output.mode.description: Output mode. batch = insert everything after the recording ends (default); segmented = cut a segment at each speech pause and insert incrementally (editor targets insert per segment; terminal targets confirm once at session end).

voiceflow.output.segmentPause.description: Segmented mode: a pause (silence) of this many seconds cuts a segment. Must be smaller than voiceflow.recording.autoStopSilence (when that is non-zero). Invalid values disable segmented mode with an error (never silently clamped).

voiceflow.cleanup.provider.description: Cleanup provider. auto = rules layer + vscode.lm (used when available); rules-only = text never leaves your machine; CLI providers must be selected explicitly.

voiceflow.cleanup.timeout.description: LLM cleanup timeout (ms). On timeout, the rules-layer result is inserted directly.

voiceflow.recording.maxDuration.description: Maximum recording duration (seconds); recording stops automatically when reached.

voiceflow.recording.autoStopSilence.description: Auto-stop after this many seconds of continuous silence (VAD); 0 = disabled. Only applies after speech has been detected.

voiceflow.recording.confirmThreshold.description: If a recording exceeds this many seconds, show a lightweight confirmation before inserting; 0 = disabled.

voiceflow.whisper.binaryDir.description: whisper.cpp binary directory (containing whisper-server.exe / whisper-cli.exe). Leave empty to use the extension's bundled bin/ directory.

voiceflow.whisper.mode.description: whisper run mode. auto = use server if the server binary exists, otherwise CLI.

voiceflow.whisper.idleUnload.description: Unload the model after this many minutes idle; 0 = keep resident.

voiceflow.rules.convertToSimplified.description: Rules layer: convert Traditional Chinese to Simplified.

voiceflow.rules.spacingCJKLatin.description: Rules layer: add spaces between CJK and Latin characters.

voiceflow.rules.normalizePunctuation.description: Rules layer: normalize common full-width/half-width punctuation.

voiceflow.rules.stripHallucinations.description: Rules layer: strip whisper's common trailing hallucinations (e.g. "谢谢观看").

scripts.bin: npm run build:helper && npm run build:whisper && npm run verify-bin
scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run build:helper && npm run build:whisper && npm run verify-bin && npm run build
